<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Take the information below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it in the /docs directory. If a .md filename is provided, use that, otherwise generate and appropriate filename based onthe generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference this new docs file.
